session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8974 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll execute the skill by fetching the PR feedback and classifying it:

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: git diff --stat -M -C main...HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "No commits found"
Check for file restructuring in current branch

session.tool_result:
{ "success": true, "pr_number": 8974, "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974", "pr_title": "Rename plan_issues module to objective_issues for semantic clarity", "review_threads": [], "discussion_comments": [ { "id": 4018723535, "author": "schrockn", "body": "Plan Queued for Implementation
submission-queued ```yaml status: queued queued_at: '2026-03-08T09:32:21.181009+00:00' submitted_by: schrockn plan_number: 8974 validation_results: pr_is_open: true has_erk_plan_label: true expected_workflow: plan-implement trigger_mechanism: label-based-webhook ```
--- Plan submitted by **schrockn** at 2026-03-08T09:32:21.181009+00:00. The `plan-implement` workflow has been dispatched via direct dispatch. **Workflow run:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22818357345", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974#issuecomment-4018723535" }, { "id": 4018724074, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "⚙️ GitHub Action Started
workflow-started ```yaml status: started started_at: '2026-03-08T09:32:51Z' workflow_run_id: '22818357345' workflow_run_url: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22818357345 plan_number: 8974 branch_name: plnd/O8381-rename-plan-issues-m-03-08-0929 ```
--- Setup completed successfully. **Branch:** `plnd/O8381-rename-plan-issues-m-03-08-0929` **PR:** [#8974](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974) **Status:** Ready for implementation [View workflow run](https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/actions/runs/22818357345)", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974#issuecomment-4018724074" }, { "id": 4018725913, "author": "github-actions[bot]", "body": "🚀 Starting implementation --- **Worktree:** `erk` **Branch:** `plnd/O8381-rename-plan-issues-m-03-08-0929`", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974#issuecomment-4018725913" }, { "id": 4018759962, "author": "schrockn", "body": "* **#8974** 👈 (View in Graphite) * `master`

This stack of pull requests is managed by Graphite. Learn more about stacking. ", "url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8974#issuecomment-4018759962" ... [33 lines omitted] ... "body": " ## ✅ Dignified Python Review **Last updated:** 2026-03-08 03:06:14 PT No violations found. All code changes are compliant with dignified-python standards.
Details ### Patterns Checked ✅ LBYL (Look Before You Leap) - No EAFP exception patterns found ✅ Exception handling at boundaries - Proper scoping and re-raising ✅ Path operations - `.exists()` checked before `.resolve()` and `.is_relative_to()` ✅ Imports - Absolute imports only, no gratuitous aliasing ✅ Dataclasses - All frozen with `@dataclass(frozen=True)` ✅ Parameter defaults - No default parameter values ✅ Keyword-only arguments - All 5+ parameter functions use `*` separator ✅ Backward compatibility - No unnecessary preservation shims ### Files Reviewed - `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/objective_issues.py`: ✅ Compliant - `packages/erk-shared/tests/unit/github/test_objective_issues.py`: ✅ Compliant - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_save_to_issue.py`: ✅ Compliant - `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/handle_no_changes.py`: ✅ Compliant - `src/erk/cli/commands/init/main.py`: ✅ Compliant - `src/erk/core/health_checks/plans_repo_labels.py`: ✅ Compliant - `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_save_to_issue.py`: ✅ Compliant - `tests/unit/objective_issues/test_label_definitions.py`: ✅ Compliant --- ### Activity Log - **2026-03-08 03:06:14 PT**: No violations detected. File rename/refactor with import updates - all code compliant with dignified-python standards.
",
